title: COHSEM Manipur Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: COHSEM Manipur Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: COHSEM Manipur 12th Result 2026 Out for Higher Secondary Examination (HSE) Class 12 on the official website - cohsemresult.nic.in on 20-04-2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the COHSEM Manipur 12th result.

content.text: The Council of Higher Secondary Education, Manipur (COHSEM) has officially released the Manipur 12th Result 2026 for Higher Secondary Examination (HSE) students across Arts, Science, and Commerce streams. Students who appeared in the COHSEM Class 12 board exams can now access their provisional marksheets online through the designated result portal. COHSEM Manipur Result 2026 has been released online on the official website - cohsemresult.nic.in.

To check their COHSEM Manipur 12th Result 2026, students need to visit the result website, open the Higher Secondary Examination (HSE) result link, and log in using their roll number as mentioned on the admit card. After submitting the details, the online scorecard will be displayed on the screen, which can be downloaded and saved for future use. Students are advised to carefully verify their name, roll number, subjects, marks scored, and overall result status, and contact the council or their respective schools immediately in case of any discrepancy in the COHSEM Class 12 result 2026.

The Council of Higher Secondary Education, Manipur has published the Manipur HSE 12th Result 2026 for Arts, Science, and Commerce streams for the 2025-26 academic session. Students can check their COHSEM Class 12 result online using their roll number through the official result portal cohsemresult.nic.in and the official website cohsem.nic.in. The online marksheet is provisional in nature, and students must collect the original marksheets from their respective schools later.

COHSEM has activated the direct link to check the Manipur 12th Result 2026 for Higher Secondary Examination students on the official result portal cohsemresult.nic.in. Using the direct link given below, students can instantly view and download their COHSEM Class 12 marksheet online by entering their roll number as per the admit card. The COHSEM Manipur 12th result link works for all streams including Arts, Science, and Commerce, making it easier for students to access their results without any delay.

sections.heading: How to Check COHSEM Manipur 12th Result 2026 Online

content.text: Follow the steps given below to check and download your COHSEM Manipur 12th Result 2026 online in a simple and error-free manner.

items: Visit the official COHSEM result website using any browser: https://cohsemresult.nic.in/.
On the homepage, click on the link that reads 'Higher Secondary Examination (HSE) Result 2026' or similar.
A result login page will open where you need to enter your COHSEM Class 12 roll number as printed on your admit card.
After entering the roll number correctly, click on the 'Submit' or 'View Result' button to proceed.
Your COHSEM Manipur 12th Result 2026 marksheet will be displayed on the screen, showing subject-wise marks, total marks, and qualifying status.
Download the online result and take a printout of the provisional marksheet for future reference until the original certificate is issued by the council.

seo_tags: COHSEM HSE Arts Science Commerce result
